id.description: The id of the created bunq.me.

created.description: The timestamp when the bunq.me was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the bunq.me was last updated.

time_expiry.description: The timestamp of when the bunq.me expired or will expire.

monetary_account_id.description: The id of the MonetaryAccount the bunq.me was sent from.

status.description: The status of the bunq.me. Can be WAITING_FOR_PAYMENT, CANCELLED or EXPIRED.

type.description: The type of the bunq.me Tab. Should be BUNQ_ME

alias_monetary_account.description: The LabelMonetaryAccount with the public information of the User and the MonetaryAccount that created the bunq.me link.

bunqme_tab_share_url.description: The url that points to the bunq.me page.

bunqme_tab_entry.description: The bunq.me entry containing the payment information.

bunqme_tab_entries.description: The bunq.me tab entries attached to this bunq.me Tab.

result_inquiries.description: The list of bunq.me result Inquiries successfully made and paid.
